title: Sinister souls
description: A mod that adds a lot of weapons, mobs and aspects to minecraft to make it challenging but fun
body:
This is my first minecraft mod for forge and it's still W.I.P.

It adds multiple fun to play with and challenging aspects like mobs and weapons.

It adds stuff like:

    Mobs (goner, ghouls, crawlers, pebblings, cyboro constructs and more!)
    A new boss: pebblor
    A whole selection of weapons (goner sword, ghoul knife, dynamite and much more)
    A bunch of structures (eldritch shrines, battle shrines, crates and more comming soon ;) )
    A drill block that mines mineralls without breaking blocks (i'm very proud of it)
    Some ores with unique uses
    And a lot of of-hand items to help you on your journey through Sinister souls

 

contributers (2):

Alvario: a good guy who likes pixel art, roblox, pickcrafter and just games in general. he came up with: pixel trashcan, 3D pixel trash can (contributer info can be found in creative)

Narry_games (me): the creator of this mod likes pixel art just like alvario and ennjoys games like pickcrafter, roblox, minecraft and terraria.
